_meta.purpose: Concrete struct-fragment examples exercising each of the six intent predicates. Each fragment is a valid subset of struct.json. The 'satisfied_case' shows the predicate holding; the 'violated_case' shows a deliberately broken state and is used by tests/test_intent_validate.sh to assert the validator catches it.

examples.name: select_one_of_satisfied
examples.description: Phase 'init_distributed' declares four branches; the resolved plan picks exactly one.

violated_case.why_violates: Two branches from S are present in the resolved plan; |selected ∩ S| == 2 != 1

examples.name: optional_disabled_dropped
examples.description: Optional component with default_enabled=false must not appear in the resolved set.

violated_case.why_violates: Component is optional and disabled, but still in resolved set.

examples.name: phase_membership_satisfied
examples.description: Every resolved component belongs to an active phase (or to a cross_cutting whose injects_into intersects active phases).

violated_case.why_violates: Optimizer is resolved but no phase declares it (and no cross_cutting injects it).

examples.name: cross_cutting_injection_satisfied
examples.description: Every phase named in cross_cutting.injects_into must be a declared phase.

violated_case.why_violates: cross_cutting 'tracking' injects_into 'undeclared_phase', which is not in phases[].phase.

examples.name: blocks_satisfied
examples.description: Each todo appears in a strictly later wave than every blocker.

violated_case.why_violates: b blocks on a but b is in wave 1, a is in wave 2.

examples.name: invariant_satisfied
examples.description: Custom forall invariant over the resolved set: every optional component that is enabled must have a non-empty description.

invariants.name: optional_enabled_has_description
invariants.predicate: if .optional == true then (.description | length > 0) else true end
invariants.message: Every enabled optional component must have a non-empty description

invariants.name: optional_enabled_has_description
invariants.predicate: if .optional == true then (.description | length > 0) else true end
invariants.message: Every enabled optional component must have a non-empty description

violated_case.why_violates: CanaryDeployer is optional + enabled but has empty description — fails the predicate.
